ko: 이 문장 고칠 수 있어? There are so much crowd in the city center
vi: Ban co the sua cau nay khong?

en: There are so much crowd in the city center.
ko: 이 문장 고칠 수 있어? There are so much crowd in the city center
ja: There are so much crowd in the city center.
zhTW: There are so much crowd in the city center.
vi: There are so much crowd in the city center.

en: We use much with uncountable nouns.
ko: much는 불가산명사에 써. 셀 수 없는 명사, 예를 들면
ja: muchは不可算名詞に使います。
zhTW: 我們用much來修飾不可數名詞。
vi: Chung ta dung much voi danh tu khong dem duoc.

en: These are nouns which we can't count, like sand or water.
ko: much는 불가산명사에 써. 셀 수 없는 명사, 예를 들면
ja: 数えられない名詞、例えば砂や水です。
zhTW: 這些是不可數名詞，像沙子或水。
vi: Day la danh tu khong dem duoc, nhu cat hay nuoc.

en: I drank too much coffee. We use many with countable nouns.
ko: 모래나 물. 커피를 너무 많이 마셨어. many는 가산명사에
ja: コーヒーを飲みすぎた。manyは可算名詞に使います。
zhTW: 我喝了太多咖啡。many用於可數名詞。
vi: Toi uong qua nhieu ca phe. Many dung voi danh tu dem duoc.

en: These are nouns that we can count, like cars or books.
ko: 써. 셀 수 있는 명사, 예를 들면 자동차나 책. 읽을
ja: 数えられる名詞、例えば車や本です。
zhTW: 這些是可數名詞，像車子或書。
vi: Day la danh tu dem duoc, nhu xe hoi hay sach.

en: I have so many books to read.
vi: Toi co qua nhieu sach phai doc.

en: Crowd is a countable noun, meaning a large group of people.
ko: 책이 너무 많아. crowd는 많은 사람들의 무리를 뜻하는 가산명사야
ja: crowdは大勢の人を意味する可算名詞です。
zhTW: Crowd是可數名詞，意思是一大群人。
vi: Crowd la danh tu dem duoc, nghia la mot nhom dong nguoi.

en: We can count groups of people, so we use many.
ko: 사람 무리를 셀 수 있으니까 many를 써. 그럼 문장을 고쳐보자
ja: 人の集まりは数えられるのでmanyを使います。
zhTW: 我們可以數人群所以用many。
vi: Co the dem nhom nguoi nen dung many.

ja: ではその文を直しましょう。
zhTW: 那我們來修正那個句子。

en: There are so many crowds in the city center.
ko: There are so many crowds in the city center. crowd를 형용사로 바꿔서
ja: There are so many crowds in the city center.
zhTW: There are so many crowds in the city center.
vi: There are so many crowds in the city center.

en: We can also change crowd into an adjective, crowded, and say,
ja: crowdを形容詞crowdedに変えて言うこともできます。
zhTW: 也可以把crowd改成形容詞crowded，說，
vi: Cung co the doi crowd thanh tinh tu crowded, noi,

en: the city center is so crowded.
ko: the city center is so crowded. much와 many를 써서 문장을 만들어봐
ja: the city center is so crowded.
zhTW: the city center is so crowded.
vi: the city center is so crowded.

en: Can you use much and many in a sentence of your own?
ko: the city center is so crowded. much와 many를 써서 문장을 만들어봐
ja: muchとmanyを使って自分で文を作れますか？
zhTW: 你能用much和many造自己的句子嗎？
vi: Ban co the dung much va many dat cau khong?

ja: コメントに書いてください。
